---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Briefly describe the gap.
A clear problem statement is more useful than a solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Mockups, screen references, or rough sketches
are great.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one is better.

## Privacy / local-first impact

Does this feature require network calls, telemetry, or storing more
data than the current default? If so, explain why it's necessary and
whether it can be opt-in.
